objective: Define a provider-neutral, private, forward-only NBA moneyline collection contract that can accumulate future timestamped quotes without creating an account, connecting a key, executing network requests, exposing raw prices publicly or unlocking market evaluation.

architecture.scheduler: provider-neutral target-time manifest; no cadence is authorized by this design
architecture.adapter: one provider adapter maps source payloads into the canonical private quote record
architecture.private_store: SQLite or equivalent local private store excluded from Git
architecture.qualification_layer: separately decides whether a stored row is point-in-time eligible

timestamp_contract.collector_fetched_at_utc: Required collector receipt time. It proves only when NBA Value Lab fetched the payload.
timestamp_contract.provider_snapshot_at_utc: Optional provider-origin snapshot time. It may become quote_observed_at_utc only after source-specific semantics are documented and qualified.
timestamp_contract.bookmaker_last_update_utc: Optional bookmaker-origin update time. It may become quote_observed_at_utc only after source-specific semantics are documented and qualified.
timestamp_contract.quote_observed_at_utc: Nullable canonical quote time. It must never be populated from collector_fetched_at_utc.
eligibility_rules: provider_snapshot authority requires a documented provider timestamp field
bookmaker_last_update authority requires documented bookmaker update semantics
unverified authority requires quote_observed_at_utc to be null
collector_fetched_at_utc may never substitute for quote_observed_at_utc
quote_observed_at_utc must be strictly before scheduled_tipoff_utc
collector_fetched_at_utc must be equal to or after every populated provider-origin timestamp
rows without verified quote time may be retained privately as forward observation records but are not point-in-time eligible

quote_contract.snapshot_label_rule: T-60, T-5 and Closing labels are derived later from qualified rows at or before predeclared target times; they are not trusted from provider marketing labels.

allowed_fields: response hashes without payloads or prices

fail_closed_conditions: source rights are unknown for private retention
stable source event identity is absent
home or away identity is missing or reversed
scheduled tipoff is absent or ambiguous
same-book two-sided moneyline cannot be proven
quote time is at or after tipoff
collector fetch time precedes a provider-origin timestamp
duplicate canonical quote key is detected
public output would expose quote-level prices or raw payloads
next_task_boundary: Implement only an offline core with synthetic adapters, schema validation, deterministic deduplication, private SQLite writes and aggregate-only QA. Do not include an HTTP client, secret reader, scheduler activation or real provider payload.
